mapper.update: CREATE TABLE USER_TOTP ( USERNAME VARCHAR2(255) NOT NULL, SECRET VARCHAR2(512) NOT NULL, ENROLLED_AT TIMESTAMP, LAST_USED_STEP NUMBER(19) DEFAULT 0, CONSTRAINT PK_USER_TOTP PRIMARY KEY (USERNAME) )
mapper.select: SELECT USERNAME FROM USER_TOTP ORDER BY USERNAME
SELECT SECRET, LAST_USED_STEP FROM USER_TOTP WHERE USERNAME = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_TOTP (USERNAME, SECRET, ENROLLED_AT, LAST_USED_STEP) VALUES (#{username}, #{secret}, #{enrolledAt}, #{lastUsedStep})
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_TOTP SET LAST_USED_STEP = #{lastUsedStep} WHERE USERNAME = #{username}
